name: Mindbase
long_description:
Mindbase is an AI avatar platform where we launch AI avatars of real human as well create artificial entities and grow them on Instagram/Youtube like a influencer using AI content strategies. 

We give each AI influencer its own email, phone number and WhatsApp account so they can build deep relationships like a human creator would. 

Already, generating over 5m+ daily views with just a network of 10+ AI influencers.

Our business model is simple: brands pay us between $1,000 to $4,000 per month per AI influencer. One of our brand partners generated $45,000 in sales from a $3,000 spend, achieving a 15X ROAS.

We believe this is just the beginning.  We can generate $20,000 annually per AI influencer. With just 5000 AI influencers we can quickly scale to $100 million ARR business. 

To put that in perspective: there are over 400 million regular human influencers globally. Even if we just target a fraction of the market, it’s a massive thing.

Our team is the key to making this happen. We're alumni of IIT and repeat founders. Previously, built TradeX, a prediction market platform, scaled that to $40 million in monthly trading volume with 5 million users. That success was driven by our trend tracking system & influencer partnerships, the very same expertise we're now using to build Mindbase.
one_liner: Build AI influencers that autonomously create content, engage fans…
